creator: rometravelers
caption:
Italians know the real secret: bread first, sauce last! 🇮🇹🥖🍝 @carms95 shows us how it’s done!

💡In Italy, meals are more than just eating; they’re a ritual of flavor and tradition. Italians often use fresh bread to scoop up sauces, ensuring not a single drop of rich tomato, creamy pesto, or velvety ragu goes to waste. This simple yet iconic practice reflects Italy’s passion for food, respect for ingredients, and a focus on communal, flavorful dining experiences.

👉Which Italian sauce would you dip your bread in first?✨

📍Italy 🇮🇹
